title: Describe your favorite player
instruction: In 3 sentences, describe your favorite footballer in English. Talk about their style, their best moment, and why you admire them.

title: Your morning in English
instruction: Describe everything you did from waking up until now — in English. Be as detailed as possible!

title: Recommend a song
instruction: Recommend your favorite song right now to a foreign friend. Describe the vibe, the artist, and why they must listen.

title: Plan your dream trip
instruction: You have 2 weeks and unlimited money. Where do you go? Describe your trip day by day — at least 5 sentences.

title: Sell me your dream car
instruction: Imagine you work at a dealership. Convince me to buy your dream car. Describe it like a salesperson!

title: Pitch your business idea
instruction: In 1 minute (5-6 sentences), pitch a business idea you'd start in Côte d'Ivoire. What's the problem? What's the solution?

title: Explain inflation simply
instruction: Explain what inflation is to a 12-year-old using a real example from everyday life in Côte d'Ivoire.

title: Defend your favorite game
instruction: Your friend says gaming is a waste of time. Defend gaming in English — give 3 strong reasons why it's valuable.

title: Review a movie or series
instruction: Give a 5-sentence review of the last movie or series you watched. Include the plot, your favorite moment, and your rating.

title: Describe your style
instruction: Describe your personal style in English. What do you wear? What brands do you like? What's your style inspiration?

title: Which animal are you?
instruction: If you were an animal, which one would you be and why? Describe the animal and link its qualities to your personality.

title: AFCON debate
instruction: Which African team will win the next AFCON and why? Give your prediction with at least 3 strong arguments.

title: Introduce yourself to the world
instruction: Imagine you're on a global podcast. Introduce yourself in 6 sentences — who you are, where you're from, what you're passionate about.

title: Top 3 Afrobeats tracks
instruction: Give your top 3 Afrobeats tracks of all time with a reason for each pick. Be passionate!
